stories.title: World Cup live updates: Congo DR take shocking ear...
Sources: Lakers trade 2 first-rounders for Kessler...
stories.summary: The Lakers are acquiring Walker Kessler from the Jazz for unprotected first-round picks in 2031 and 2033 and first-round swaps in 2028 and 2030 and signing Sandro Mamukelashvili, Quentin Grimes and Collin Sexton, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Robinson, Celtics agree on $47.4M deal
stories.summary: Mitchell Robinson, fresh off winning an NBA title with the Knicks, has agreed to a three-year, $47.4 million deal to sign with the Celtics, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Sources: Conley to C's, 12th to reach 20 seasons
stories.summary: Free agent guard Mike Conley Jr. has agreed to a one-year deal to sign with the Boston Celtics, sources told ESPN, with Conley becoming the 14th player to reach 20 NBA seasons.

stories.title: Sources: Powell lands 2-yr., $45M deal with Bulls
stories.summary: Free agent guard Norman Powell has agreed to a two-year, $45 million deal with join the Chicago Bulls, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.
